Popular Exercises

Push-ups

Chest / Triceps

3×10-15

Bodyweight Squats

3×15-20

3×15

Pike Push-ups

3×8-12

Plank Hold

3×30-60s

Walking Lunges

Legs

3×12/leg

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I really need zero equipment?

Yes! All exercises use just your bodyweight. If you have resistance bands or a pull-up bar, you can mention that in the notes for even more variety.

Can I build muscle without weights?

Absolutely. Bodyweight exercises build functional strength and muscle, especially for beginners and intermediates. We use higher reps and time-under-tension to compensate.

How much space do I need?

Very little — about the size of a yoga mat (2m × 1m). Perfect for apartments, hotel rooms, or small home offices.
